label: Ritual target filter
description: Defines logic for filtering valid ritual targets when a player initiates a ritual.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class implementing the target filter logic. Must extend RitualTargetFilter.

fallBackToGatherSpot.label: Fall back to gather spot
fallBackToGatherSpot.description: If true, falls back to a gather spot when no valid target is found.

fallbackToRitualSpot.label: Fallback to ritual spot
fallbackToRitualSpot.description: If true, falls back to a ritual spot building when no valid target is found.

new-ritual-target-filter.label: New ritual target filter
new-ritual-target-filter.description: Minimal ritual target filter with a worker class.
